seasonal_maintenance.headline: Lowering your {{state}} energy bills
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Check your weatherstripping near {{parks}} before the first freeze. Replacing worn fuzzy seals saves $50+ on {{city}} heating bills.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Wash your window tracks near {{neighborhood}}. High {{state}} humidity can cause weep holes to clog, leading to sill wood rot.
